subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-09-01
subcodes.first_line: God the Almighty has created all humanity from dust, from the same elements
subcodes.first_line_orig: خداوند عالم جمیع را از تراب خلق فرموده جمیع را از یک عناصر خلق کرده کل را از
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @oneness; unity of religion, @equality of men and women, @call to action, @war and peace, @prayer for peace and unity, @universal language, @race unity; racial issues, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @religion as reality; definitions of religion
